vocab.exampleEn: The instructions were straightforward, so I knew exactly what to do.
vocab.exampleZh: 说明很清楚，所以我知道该做什么。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use straightforward instead of very easy when talking about tasks or explanations.
vocab.upgradeZh: 说任务或解释很简单时，用 straightforward 比 very easy 更自然。

cycle.summaryEn: Turn simple ideas into cleaner IELTS lines and link them smoothly.
cycle.summaryZh: 把简单意思改成更像雅思答案的表达，并把句子连起来。

frame.useEn: Use when comparing ideas or data.

meaningEn: This speaking word helps Becky sound clearer and more natural.
meaningZh: 这个口语词可以帮助 Becky 说得更清楚、更自然。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "straightforward" using Compared with ..., ...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "straightforward" 和 与……相比，... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
